content.en:
Hayes Heavenly Ancestor didn't know if Ye Tian's words were true, but he didn't plan to snatch Ye Tian's primeval gold leaf either.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, if you want to exchange the Ancient Gold Leaf, I can call the shots. However, I can only exchange years with you for a while, and if you can't do it, you have to exchange it back. "

Hayes Tianzu Road.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked.

He didn't expect it to be so easy, so he exchanged for the second primeval technique.

Of course, this also has something to do with the fact that he is an ancient-level genius, if he is just a boundary-breaking genius and dares to propose a deal with the Hays Heavenly Ancestor, the Hayes Heavenly Ancestor is afraid that he will slap him to death!

Some time later.

Ye Tian and Hayes Heavenly Ancestor both brought the primeval gold leaf.

After confirming that the two sides were correct, they exchanged the primeval gold leaf.

"After ten primeval eras, I will exchange it with you for the primeval gold leaf. Hayes Heavenly Ancestor demanded.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Then, the Celestial Ancestor of Hayes left.

Inside the Universal City.

Ye Tian began to silently comprehend the primeval technique on this primeval gold leaf-the primeval blood spear, which was also the primeval technique possessed by the Hays Heavenly Ancestor.

The power of the Ancient Blood Spear is similar to that of the Ancient God and Demon Fist, but this is the second Ancient Technique that he has comprehended, so it will be very difficult.

Similarly, cultivating the Ancient Blood Spear required the consumption of Ancient Golden Blood, and his current amount of Ancient Golden Blood was not large.

However, in the Cosmos Space-Time Network, the Heavenly Ancestor of the Blood Transformation Realm would occasionally sell a little Ancient Golden Blood, and he would buy it as soon as possible.

But the amount of primeval gold blood is too rare, almost a cup of money.

Therefore, while cultivating the Ancient Blood Spear, he also had to collect some Ancient Gold Blood.

"The White Shadow Elephant Clan had robbed a lot of Ancient Gold Blood, but they definitely wouldn't take it out again, the Ancient Demon Ape Clan, it's almost the same, it's not realistic to trade Ancient Gold Blood from these two races. "

But Ye Tian dared to cultivate the second primeval technique, so he naturally had a way to obtain a large amount of primeval golden blood.

In the gap between the territorial waters, there are still a small number of primeval races, and these primeval races are very powerful, but the number of clansmen is scarce.

Among them, in the territory near the Cosmos Tower, there is an ancient race, and it also has a certain amount of primeval gold blood reserves.

This primeval race is the primeval dragon and snake clan!

The Ancient Dragons and Serpents are not very powerful among the Ancient Races, but they do not participate in any battles, and they occupy a very special Ancient Treasure Land, the Dragon and Snake Sea, which has survived the Ancient War.

Although they were considered miserable in order to save the primeval dragon and snake clan at the beginning, they managed to survive.

At present, the Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan rarely goes out of the Dragon Snake Sea, and they must not offend other forces, plus they themselves have nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures, so no force will provoke them.

The reason why Ye Tian wanted to trade with the Ancient Dragon Snake was because the Ancient Dragon Snake had made such a deal with a cultivator.

However, the primeval dragon snake only accepts specific resources as trades, and general resources, they are not worth it.

The resource that the primeval dragon snake clan needs is the dragon snake stone, which is very important to the primeval dragon clan to help them grow.

However, the Dragon Snake Stone was mainly born in the territory of the Sea Dragon Clan, the White Sea Treasure Land!

In the primeval era of the territorial sea boundary gap, the White Sea Treasure Land used to belong to the primeval dragon snake, but they lost this treasure land.

Later, this treasure land was occupied by the Sea Dragon clan.

The Sea Dragon Clan is not an ancient race, just a race with an ancient bloodline, but there are too many races in this race, plus a powerhouse who also has nine blood transformation realms.

If the Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan wanted to occupy the White Sea Treasure Land, they couldn't do it at all.

In addition, the Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan and the Sea Dragon Clan had contradictions, so the Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan did not dare to enter the White Sea Treasure Land.

Moreover, in this era, the primeval race is also afraid of being caught by other forces and falling into the fate of the primeval monitor lizard.

Therefore, the primeval sea dragon clan will not come out, and will only exchange resources like primeval golden blood for dragon snake stones.

"I'll enter the White Sea Treasure Land, look for some more dragon snake stones, and then exchange the dragon snake stone and the primeval dragon snake for the primeval golden blood!" Ye Tian planned.

......

White Sea Treasure.

Ye Tian came to this vicinity, this is the territory of the sea dragon clan, so there are not many sea dragons here, and they can be seen from time to time.

He sneaked in and soon found a sea dragon with three blood transformations.

Without saying a word, after killing the other party in an instant, he copied the body of this sea dragon.

Subsequently, he used the replica body of the sea dragon to enter the White Sea Treasure Land to find the dragon snake stone or trade the dragon snake stone.

In fact, the effect of dragon snake stones on the sea dragon clan is far less great than that of the primeval dragon snake, so they are not very important to dragon snake stones.

However, the Sea Dragon Clan would not trade the Dragon Snake Stone, for fear of falling into the hands of the Ancient Dragon Snake and enhancing the strength of the Ancient Dragon Snake.

Since the sea dragon clan was not important to the dragon snake stone, Ye Tian's sea dragon copy body could easily get some dragon snake stones.

The Sea Dragon clan didn't expect an outsider from their clan, so they didn't care about this matter at all.

As time passed, more and more dragon snake stones fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Once!

Twice!

Three times!

Ye Tian transported the dragon snake stones from the White Sea Treasure Land again and again, which greatly reduced the number of dragon snake stones in the White Sea Treasure Land.

At this time, the sea dragon clan obviously came out, and they still investigated.

"I guess it's about to be exposed, just annihilate this replica body!"

Airplanes!

The sea dragon's copy body was directly annihilated, and the clues were broken, and they couldn't find out no matter how they checked.

After that, he went to the Dragon Snake Sea, where the Ancient Dragon and Snake clan was located.

The Dragon Snake Sea is the source of the birth of the primeval dragon snake, and the strength of the outside creatures will be suppressed here, especially in the depths of the Dragon Snake Sea, the suppression is extremely terrifying.

Because of this, even the Nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures did not dare to fight the Nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures of the Ancient Dragon Snake in the depths of the Dragon Snake Sea.

When Ye Tian descended on the Dragon Snake Sea, several primeval dragon snakes stopped Ye Tian.

"Cultivator, stop!"

An Ancient Dragon Snake of the Six Blood Transformation Realm stopped Ye Tian and said.

"My name is Endless Heavenly Ancestor, I'm here to trade with the Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan, I have a large number of Dragon Snake Stones in my hands!" Ye Tian said.

"A lot of dragon snake stones!"

These primeval dragons and snakes were taken aback, but they didn't immediately believe Ye Tian's words, but went to report.

In the Dragon Snake Mountain in the depths of the Dragon Snake Sea, three primeval dragon snakes of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm are cultivating here.

Suddenly, a member of the clan came to report.
